title: Create: Oppenheimered
description: Adds some crafting compatibility between Alex's Caves and Create
body:
Create: Oppenheimered is a mod which allows certain items from Alex's Caves to be crafted automatically using machines from Create. You need Alexs Caves and Create for this mod to work,

For exact details, consider using a mod such as JEI.

Some Notable Changes:

### Compacting

Abyssmarine, Galena, Limestone and Amber can be made using renewable materials.
Make Fissile Cores from Uranium and Iron.
Chocolate Blocks and Dough Blocks can be used using Create materials.
Turn Fissile Cores back into Uranium.
Cake Layers can be made in a similar fashion.
Flood Basalt can be made with lava and Smooth Basalt.

### Crushing

Certain mob drops such as Depth Charges and Telecores can be crushed. 
Ores such as Uranium and Guanostone Redstone Ore can be processed properly.
Sprinkles can be crushed from rock candy.
Amber can be crushed to get a Curiosity.

### Cutting (Sawing)

Pewen and Thornwood logs can be sawed.
Make more Dino Nuggets from dinosaur chops. 
Tough Hides and Notor Gizmos can also be sawed, disassembling them into Leather and Redstone respectively.

### Deploying

Magnetic Lights and Holocoders can be made using deployers.
Electron tubes can be made from Notor Gizmos.
Heart of the Sea can be made from Immortal Embryo.
Also adds a way to make Precision Mechanisms using magnetic cave materials.
Gazing Eye can be made from Eye of Ender and Pearl.
Turn Ink Bombs into Glow Bombs with Glowstone.
Cookies can be made with Gingerbread Crumbs.

### Spout Filling

Acid poured into bottle = Potion of Poison.
Acid poured onto Enchanted Golden Apple = normal Golden Apple.
Dissolve Amber into Nautilus Shells using Acid.
Sweet Rolls can be made with Gingerbread Crumbs.

### Mixing

Make Ambersol from Blaze Powder, Amber and Glow Berries. 
Curly Ferns can be grown.
Ice cream can be made with Licoroot, Milk, and Ice.
Switch between Scarlet and Azure Neodymium.
Make Acid by combining Water and Sulfur Dust.
Duplicate Ping-Pong Sponges
Purple Soda can be mixed from Honey, Sweet Berries, and Sprinkles.
Ink Bombs can be made using Sea Glass Shards and Ink Sacs.

### Splashing

Convert Scrap Metal, Scrap Metal Plates, Metal Barrels, etc. to their rusted form by splashing them with water (with a Mechanical Fan)

### Crafting Table

Craft the Enigmatic Engine and Geothermal Vents.
Deconstruct Sulfur Blocks into nine Sulfur Dust. 

### Misc

Make Hot Chocolate using Peppermint.
Candy Canes can be made from Peppermint.
